title: UBUSHINJACYAHA v. MANIRAFASHA
text:
UBUSHINJACYAHA v. MANIRAFASHA
[Rwanda URUKIKO RW’UBUJURIRE – RPAA 01290/2024/CA (Umugwaneza, P.J.)
21 Ugushyingo 2025]
Amategeko agenga imanza z’inshinjabyaha – Icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge – Ibimenyetso
– Mu kwemeza ko uregwa yakoze icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge bishobora gushingira
kubimenyetso birimo ibiyobyabwenge n’amafaranga byafatiriwe no kubatangabuhamya bemeza
ko uwo muntu asanzwe acuruza ibiyobyabwenge.
Incamake y’ikibazo: Manirafasha Gilbert yakurikiranyweho n’Ubushinjacyaha icyaha cyo
gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge nyuma yuko afatanywe udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi n’utundi 35
tw’urumogi, n’akandi kamwe (1) ka mugo, bumuregera Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge
busaba ko ahamwa n’icyaha, akagihanirwa.
Urukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko uregwa ahamwa icyaha cyo
gufatanwa no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi. Rumuhanisha igifungo
cy’imyaka 25 n’ihazabu ya miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000Frw).
Uregwa yajuririye mu Rukiko Rukuru asaba guhindurirwa inyito y’icyaha avuga ko yafatanwe
urumogi ariko ko atarucuruza, ndetse anenga imvugo z’abatangabuhamya batagaragaza
uwabahaye amakuru ko acuruza urumogi.
Urukiko Rukuru rwaciye urubanza rwemeza ko urubanza rwajuririwe ruhindutse kubyerekeranye
n’ibihano. Rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 17 n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw.
Uregwa yajuririye mu Rukiko rw’Ubujurire avuga ko yahamijwe icyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge Urukiko Rukuru mu rubanza rujuririrwa rugendeye ku bimenyetso bitavugisha
ukuri nyamara nta gihamya ko abicuruza. Asaba ko yahanirwa gufatanwa no kunywa udupfunyika
6 tw’urumogi two kwinywera, yari avuye kugura n’uwitwa Amani Christian; ndetse Urukiko
rukamugabanyiriza igihano kubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha.
Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire za Manirafasha Gilbert zidafite ishingiro kuko
hari ibimenyetso bimuhamya gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge, kandi ko atari ubwa mbere ahaniwe
ibiyobyabwenge. Busaba ko hagumaho imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe.
Incamake y’icyemezo: 1. Mu kwemeza ko uregwa yakoze icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge
bishobora gushingira kubimenyetso birimo ibiyobyabwenge n’amafaranga byafatiriwe no
kubatangabuhamya bemeza ko uwo muntu asanzwe acuruza ibiyobyabwenge.
2. Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano ku buryo
bukurikira: …; (a) igifungo cya burundu gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano
cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, … (d) igihano cy’ihazabu gishobora kugabanywa kugeza kuri kimwe
cya kane cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.
Ubujurire nta shingiro bufite.
Urubanza rujuririrwa ruhindutse gusa ku bijyanye n’igihano uregwa yahanishijwe.

Amategeko yashingiweho:
Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018
riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, ingingo ya 2.
Imanza zifashishijwe:
RPAA 00408/2020/CA; Ubushinjacyaha vs Niyitegeka Augustin alias Niyirema rwaciwe
n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 27/06/2022;
RPAA 00198/2024/CA; Ubushinjacyaha vs Gatesi Hasina rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku
wa 17/04/2025.
Urubanza
I. IMITERERE Y’URUBANZA
[1] Polisi, ishami rishinzwe kurwanywa ibiyobyabwenge (ANU) bahawe amakuru ko
Manirafasha Gilbert acuruza ibiyobyabwenge akabishyira uwitwa Amani Christian, nibwo ku wa
28/03/2020, 16h00, muri Kagarama, mu Kagari ka Rugira, mu Mudugudu w’Umurimo, aba polisi
bagiye mu gipangu iwabo wa Amani Christian, uyu, ababonye arasimbuka arabacika, akaba
yarikumwe na Manirafasha Gilbert, nawe ababonye yurira igipangu ajya kwihisha munsi
y’imodoka, aba ariho aba polisi bamufata, bamugarura muricyo gipangu, basanga mu gikapu cye
cyarimo imyenda harimo udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi, bafatira muricyo gipangu inyuma y’inzu
y’iwabo wa Amani Christian utundi dupfunyika 35 tw’urumogi, n’agapfunyika kamwe (1) ka
mugo. Manirafasha Gilbert ashyikirizwa Ubugenzacyaha.
[2] Nyuma y’iperereza, Ubushinjacyaha bwamureze mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa
Nyarugenge, icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge, busaba ko cyamuhama, akagihanirwa.
[3] Manirafasha, Gilbert, yaburanye yemera icyaha cyo gufatanwa ibiyobyabwenge ahakana
icyo kubicuruza, asobanura ko udupfunyika 6 bamufatanye ari two yari yaje kugura kugira ngo
atunywe, ko urugurisha ari Amani Christian.
[4] Mu rubanza RP 00613/2020/TGI/NYGE, rwaciwe ku wa 09/12/2021, Urukiko
Rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge, rwasanze hari ibimenyetso bihamya Manirafasha Gilbert icyaha
cyo gufatanwa no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi bigizwe na:
a) Inyandiko mvugo y’ifatira yashyizeho umukono we yemera ko yafatanwe udupfunyika
6 tw’urumogi;
b) Imvugo z’abatangabuhamya Nsaguye Jean Bosco na Nasingizwe Jean Marie Vianney,
bakaba ari nabo bamufashe, bamushinja gucuruza urumogi, bakaba baranarumufatanye.
Urukiko rushingiye kuri ibyo bimenyetso, rwahamije Manirafasha Gilbert, icyaha cyo
gufatanwa no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi. Rumuhanisha
igifungo cy’imyaka 25 n’ihazabu ya miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000Frw).

[5] Manirafasha Gilbert yajuririye urwo rubanza mu Rukiko Rukuru, asaba guhindurirwa
inyito y’icyaha avuga ko yafatanwe urumogi ariko ko atarucuruza, akaba anenga imvugo
z’abatangabuhamya batagaragaza uwabahaye amakuru ko acuruza urumogi.
[6] Ubushinjacyaha busaba ko hashingirwa kubyasobanuwe mu gika cya 11 cy’urubanza
ajuririra aho Urukiko rwagaragaje ko Manirafasha Gilbert yafatanwe ibiyobyabwenge kandi
n’abamufashe bamushinja kurucuza kubera amakuru bari bahawe ko arucuruza. Akaba kandi yari
ataramara umwaka afunguwe azira icyaha cyo gucuruza urumogi. Busaba ko hagumaho ibihano
yahanishijwe.
[7] Mu rubanza RPA 01859/2021/HC/KIG, rwaciwe ku wa 30/10/2024, Urukiko Rukuru,
nyuma yo gusuzuma impamvu z’ubujurire za Manirafasha Gilbert, rwasanze hari ibimenyetso
bimuhamya icyaha cyo gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge bigizwe n’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya
bamushinja gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge ndetse no kuba baramufatanye ingano nini
y’ibiyobyabwenge. Rwasanze kandi n’ubwo impamvu ze z’ubujurire zidafite ishingiro akwiriye
kugabanyirizwa ibihano kuko ari ubwa mbere aguye mu cyaha ku buryo buzwi kandi akaba
yarafatiwe mu cyuho urumogi yarazanye gucuruza rutari rwagera kubarunywa. Rwemeza ko
urubanza rwajuririwe ruhindutse kubyerekeranye n’ibihano. Rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 17
n’ihazabu ya 5.000.000 Frw.
[8] Manirafasha Gilbert yajuririye Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, urubanza ruhabwa RPAA
01290/2024/CA, ruburanishwa mu ruhame ku wa 06/11/2025, Manirafasha Gilbert yunganiwe na
Me Byiringiro Kalisa, Ubushinjacyaha buhagarariwe na Harindintwari Côme, Umushinjacyaha ku
rwego rw’igihugu.
[9] Mu mwanzuro we w’ubujurire Manirafasha Gilbert avuga ko Urukiko Rukuru mu rubanza
rujuririrwa rwagendeye ku bimenyetso bitavugisha ukuri maze rumuhamya icyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge nyamara nta gihamya ko abicuruza. Ko udupfunyika 35 tw’urumogi
n’agapfunyika kamwe ka mugo yabigeretsweho kandi ari ibya Amani Christian ubicuruza. Asaba
ko yahanirwa gufatanwa no kunywa ibiyobyabwenge kuko yafatanwe udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi
two kwinywera, avuye kutugura na Amani Christian.
[10] Me wunganira Manirafasha Gilbert, mu mwanzuro we, avuga ko nta bimenyetso
bidashidikanywaho Urukiko Rukuru rwashingiyeho ruhamya Manirafasha Gilbert icyaha cyo
gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge. Asobanura ko abatangabuhamya bamushinja ari aba polisi bagiye
kumufata kandi bavuga ko bari bahawe amakuru n’abaturage ariko ntibagaragaza abo baturage
niba amakuru babahaye ari ukuri. Asaba Urukiko guhanira Manirafasha Gilbert icyaha cyo
gufatanwa no kunywa ibiyobyabwenge, rukamugabanyiriza ibihano kubera impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha.
[11] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire za Manirafasha Gilbert zidafite ishingiro
kuko hari ibimenyetso bimuhamya gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge, kandi ko atari ubwa mbere ahaniwe
ibiyobyabwenge. Busaba ko hagumaho imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe.
[12] Hakurikijwe izo mpaka, muri uru rubanza harasuzumwa ikibazo cyo kumenya niba
Manirafasha Gilbert yahindurirwa inyito y’icyaha agahanirwa gufatanwa no kunywa

ibiyobyabwenge aho kuba kubicuruza ndetse no kumenya niba akwiriye kugagabanyirizwa
ibihano.
I. ISESENGURA RY’IBIBAZO BIGIZE URUBANZA
a) Kumenya niba Manirafasha Gilbert yahindurirwa inyito y’icyaha agahanirwa
gufatanwa no kunywa ibiyobyabwenge aho kuba kubicuruza.
[13] Manirafasha Gilbert, mu mwanzuro we no mu miburanire ye, avuga ko atishimiye imikirize
y’urubanza rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru kuko rwirengagije ibimenyetso bikomeye ko hatabayeho
gucuruza kuko yafatiwe mu rugo rwa Amani Christian ucuruza urumogi aje kumugurira urwo
kunywa. Akaba asanga inenge ziri muri urwo rubanza ari uko mu gika cyarwo cya 16,
yageretsweho udupfunyika 35 tw’urumogi n’agapfunyika kamwe ka mugo byafatiwe mu nzu ya
Amani Christian nyamara we mu gikapu cye cyarimo imyenda ye, bahasanze udupfunyika 6
tw’urumogi, ari natwo yasobanuye ko yari yaje kugura two kunywa.
[14] Akomeza asobanura ko abatangabuhamya Nasingizwe Jean Marie Vianney na Nsaguye
Jean Bosco ari nabo bamufashe, basobanuye neza ko mu gikapu cye cyarimo imyenda ye
basanzemo udupfunyika dutandatu (6) tw’urumogi. Asobanura ko iyo, ibyo biyobyabwenge
byamugeretsweho biza kuba ari ibye, biba byarasanzwe mu gikapu cye. Akaba asaba Urukiko
gusuzumana ubushishozi ubuhamya bw’abamufashe no kumurenganura.
[15] Manirafasha Gilbert asobanura kandi ko ikindi kigaragaza ko we atacuruzaga urumogi, ari
uko hatigeze hagaragazwa umuntu n’umwe uzwi wemeza ko yaba yaragurishije urumogi ndetse
n’Urukiko mu rubanza ajuririra rwemeje ko ari ubwa mbere aguye mu cyaha bigaragaza ko nta
gihamya n’imwe rwashingiyeho rwemeza ko acuruza ibiyobyabwenge. Avuga ko atigeze ahanirwa
gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge nk’uko Ubushinjacyaha bwamushinje, ko icyaha yigeze guhanirwa ari
icyo kunywa urumogi.
[16] Akomeza avuga kandi ko ikindi kigaragaza ko yaje kugura ibiyobyabwenge kwa Amani
Christian, ari uko nyuma gato y’uko afatiweyo, hafatiweho uwitwa Gatera Olivier ku wa
11/04/2021, afatanwa udupfunyika tubiri (2) twa mugo yari amaze kugura na Amani Christian,
uyu nawe afatanwa udupfunyika 18 twa mugo aho yari yahishe rwa rumogi bamugeretseho, bombi
barabarega mu Rukiko Rwisumbuye rwa Nyarugenge, maze mu rubanza RP
00680/2021/TGI/NYGE, rwasomwe ku wa 15/09/2022, Urukiko rwemeza ko Gatera Olivier
ahanishwa igifungo cy’umwaka umwe naho Amani Christian ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 10.
[17] Manirafasha Gilbert avuga kandi ko asanga inenge ihari, ari uko kuruhande rumwe
hemejwe ko Gatera Olivier yari yaje kugura ibiyobyabwenge kwa Amani Christian ariko kurundi
ruhande hemezwa ko we yacuruzaga kandi nyamara uko Gatera yafatiwe kwa Amani Christian aje
kugura ibiyobyabwenge ari nako nawe byamugendekeye.
[18] Mu miburanire ye, Manirafasha Gilbert, avuga kandi ko asanga abashinzwe umutekano
baba barahawe amakuru ko Amani Christian acuruza urumogi, bagera iwabo arabacika, aba ariwe
bafata bamwitiranyije na Amani Christian.

[19] Asaba Urukiko gukoresha ubushishozi bwarwo rukabona ko udupfunyika 6 yafatanwe
twari utwo kunywa akaba ari nabyo yahanirwa, agahanishwa igifungo cy’umwaka umwe nk’uko
byakozwe kuri mugenzi we Gatera Olivier, bityo rukamurenganura ku cyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge.
[20] Me umwunganira, nawe ashimangira ibyasobanuwe na Manirafasha Gilbert, asobanura ko
nta kimenyetso kigaragaza ko uwo yunganira acuruza ibiyobyabwenge, ko nta kigaragaza ko
Manirafasha Gilbert yafatanwe udupfunyika 35 tw’ibiyobyabwenge kuko aho rwafatiwe atari mu
rugo rwe, ahubwo ko utwo dupfunyika 35 twari utwa Amani Christian kuko twafatiwe iwe, akaba
yaracitse aba polisi.
[21] Me akomeza asobanura ko ingano y’ibiyobyabwenge Manirafasha Gilbert yafatanwe
(udupfunyika 6) nk’uko inyandiko mvugo y’ifatira ibigaragaza ari nto bityo ikaba igaragaza ko
twari utwo kwinywera atari agamije kubicuruza (simple drug possession), ibi bikaba
byaratanzweho umurongo mu rubanza RPAA 00082/2022/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire
ku wa 24/04/2023, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Habumugisha Sadi1.
[22] Me avuga kandi ko abatangabuhamya bavugwa, ari aba polisi, kandi amakuru bavuga
bahawe batigeze bagaragaza uwayabahaye no kumenya ko bavugisha ukuri ndetse no kuba abo
baturage bavuga batanze amakuru batabajijwe nabyo n’inenge zigomba gukosorwa. Akaba asanga
nk’uko Manirafasha Gilbert yabisobanuye, udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi yafatanwe ari utwo kunywa
bityo akaba yahanirwa gufatanwa no kunywa ibiyobyabwenge.
[23] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga ko impamvu z’ubujurire za Manirafasha Gilbert zidafite ishingiro
kuko hari ibimenyetso bimuhamya gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge aho abashinzwe umutekano bahawe
amakuru ko acuruza ibiyobyabwenge bajya kumureba iwabo wa Amani Christian aho yari ari,
bamufatana udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi, bakomeza gusaka mu nzu iwabo wa Amani Christian
bahafatira urundi rumogi udupfunyika 35 ndetse n’agapfunyika kamwe ka mugo.
[24] Ubushinjacyaha bukomeza busobanura ko hari inyandiko mvugo y’ifatira Manirafasha
Gilbert yashyizeho umukono we ko yafatanwe udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi ariko akanga gusinyira
udupfunyika 35 tw’urumogi n’agapfunyika kamwe ka mugo. Bukomeza buvuga ko abamufashe
aribo Nsaguye Jean Bosco na Nasingizwe Jean Marie Vianney bagendeye ku makuru bahawe
n’abaturage ko Manirafasha Gilbert asanzwe acuruza urumogi kandi bagiyeyo bamufatana
urumogi kandi ari kumwe n’uwo asanzwe arugurisha. Busaba ko yahanirwa gufatanwa no
gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge bikomeye.
[25] Ubushinjacyaha buvuga kandi ko imyiregurire ya Manirafasha Gilbert ko
abatangabuhamya ari aba polisi ko kandi batavuga abatanze amakuru, busanga nta nenge irimo
kuko bakoze ibikorwa bishingiye ku mategeko kandi ko nta tegeko ribahatira gutangaza ababahaye
amakuru nk’uko biteganywa n’ingingo ya 9, y’Itegeko no 44 bis/2017 ryo ku wa 06/09/2017,
1 Me avuga ko mu gika cya 14 cy’urwo rubanza Urukiko rwatanze umurongo aho rwemeje ko “iyo nta
bimenyetso bigaragaza ko uregwa wafatanywe ingano nto y’ibiyobyabwenge yahinze, yatunze cyangwa
yabitse yari agamije kubikwirakwiza no kubigurisha, afatwa nk’uwari ugamije kubyikoreshereza (simple
drug possession) aho kubicuruza no kubikwirakwiza (drug trafficking/ drug distribution), agahabwa
ibihano bito”.

rirengera abatanga amakuru ku byaha, ku bikorwa cyangwa imyitwarire binyuranyije
n’amategeko.
[26] Bukomeza buvuga kandi ko nk’uko byagarutsweho n’Urukiko Rukuru, mu gika cya 14
cy’urubanza rujuririrwa, mu rubanza RPAA 00436/2020/CA rw’Ubushinjacyaha na Ahimpereye
Ndeze Franҫois, rwaciwe ku wa 28/06/2022, mu gika cya 24, rwemeje ko umuntu atagirwa
umucuruzi no kuba hari abaguzi babonetse aho acururiza, ahubwo igihe cyose afite ibicuruzwa
kandi yiteguye kubiha umuntu wese umugana ashaka ibyo agurisha, aba ari umucuruzi”, bityo
bukaba busanga imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe ikwiriye kugumaho, busobanura ko
Manirafasha Gilbert ari umusubiracyaha(recidiviste) nk’uko bigaragazwa n’urubanza RP
0064/012/TB/KMA.
[27] Ubushinjacyaha mu miburanire yabwo, bwasobanuye kandi ko ibyo Manirafasha Gilbert
yireguje avuga ko bamwitiranyije na Amani Christian ucuruza ibiyobyabwenge ataribyo kuko
abashinzwe umutekano baje kumufata bamaze guhabwa amakuru ko acuruza urumogi,
akaruranguza Amani Christian kandi bararumufatana. Buvuga kandi ko kuba Amani Christian ari
umucuruzi w’urumogi no kuba yarabihaniwe bidakuraho ko Manirafasha Gilbert yacuruje
urumogi.
[28] Ku bijyanye n’ingano nto y’ibiyobyabwenge Manirafasha Gilbert n’umwunganizi we
bavuga yafatanwe bityo akaba yahanirwa gufatanwa no kunywa ibiyobyabwenge, Ubushinjacyaha
buvuga ko ikibazo atari ingano nto yafatanwe ahubwo ari igicuruzwa yafatanwe kuko niyo yari
kuba ari agapfunyika kamwe yafatanwe acuruza byari kwitwa gucuruza. Busaba ko hagumaho
imikirize y’urubanza rwajuririwe.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
Impaka kuri iyi ngingo, zishingiye kukumenya niba ManirafashaGilbert yahindurirwa inyito
y’icyaha, agahanirwa icyaha cyo gufatanwa no kunywa ibiyobyabwenge byo mubwoko
bw’urumogi aho guhanirwa icyaha cyo kubicuruza yahanishijwe n’inkiko zibanza hakurikijwe
ibikorwa yakoze.
[29] Ibyerekeranye no kwemeza ko uregwa yakoze icyaha cyo kugurisha ibiyobyabwenge,
byasobanuwe mu rubanza RPAA 00408/2020/CA, rwaciwe ku wa 27/06/2022, haburana
Ubushinjacyaha na Niyitegeka Augustin alias Niyirema. Muri urwo rubanza, Urukiko
rw’Ubujurire rwasobanuye ko mu kwemeza ko uregwa yakoze icyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge bishobora gushingira kubimenyetso birimo ibiyobyabwenge n’amafaranga
byafatiriwe no kubatangabuhamya bemeza ko uwo muntu asanzwe acuruza ibiyobyabwenge2. Uyu
murongo wagendeweho mu manza zitandukanye zaciwe n’uru Rukiko, harimo n’urubanza RPAA
00198/2024/CA, rwaciwe n’Urukiko rw’Ubujurire ku wa 17/04/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha
na Gatesi Hasina3.
2 Reba igika cya 18 cy’urwo rubanza.
3 Reba igika cya 21

[30] Dosiye y’urubanza igaragaza ko polisi, ishami rishinzwe kurwanya ibiyobyabwenge
(ANU) bahawe amakuru n’abaturage ko Manirafasha Gilbert acuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu
bwoko bw’urumogi, akabishyira uwitwa Amani Christian, bahabwa amakuru ko Manirafasha
Gilbert ari iwabo wa Amani Christian, bajyayo, bamufatana udupfunyika dutandatu (06)
tw’urumogi twari mu gikapu cye kirimo imyenda.
[31] Dosiye inagaragaza ko Manirafasha Gilbert yemera ko yafatanwe utwo dupfunyika 06,
anashyira umukono we ku nyandiko mvugo y’ifatira4, ariko agakahana utundi dupfunyika 35
tw’urumogi n’agapfunyika kamwe (1) ka mugo twafatiwe iwabo wa Amani Christian,
agasobanura ko ari ibya Amani Christian wacitse polisi mu gihe bazaga iwabo kubafata.
[32] Dosiye igaragaza kandi imvugo z’abatangabuhamya Nasingizwe Jean Marie Vianney na
Nsaguye Jean Bosco, bashinja Manirafasha Gilbert gucuruza urumogi. Bakaba ari aba polisi,
bashinzwe kurwanya ibiyobyabwenge, basobanura ko bahawe amakuru ko Manirafasha Gilbert
acuruza urumogi akanarunywa, kandi ko ari iwabo wa Amani Christian, bajyayo barahamusanga.
[33] Basobanura kandi ko, bakihagera, Amani Christian yarabacitse, Manirafasha Gilbert nawe
arabacika ariko baza kumufata, bamusubiza aho yari ari iwabo wa Amani Christian, bamufatana
udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi turi mu gikapu cye cyarimo imyenda n’irangamuntu ye. Banavuga ko
atari ubwa mbere Manirafasha ahaniwe ibiyobyabwenge, basobanura ko yahaniwe kunywa
ibiyobyabwenge muri 20195.
[34] Mu rubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko Rukuru, rwahamije Manirafasha Gilbert icyaha cyo
gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi rushingiye ku mvugo z’abatangabuhamya
bamushinja gucuruza urumogi ndetse no kuba yarafatanwe ingano nini y’ibiyobyabwenge igizwe
n’udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi twasanzwe mu gikapu cyarimo imyenda ye ndetse n’udupfunyika 35
tw’urumogi n’agapfunyika 1 ka mugo byasanzwe inyuma y’inzu y’iwabo wa Amani Christian6.
[35] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, ruremeranywa n’Urukiko Rukuru ku kimenyetso cy’imvugo
z’abatangabuhamya rwashingiyeho mu guhamya Manirafasha Gilbert icyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge, kuko abo batangabuhamya Nasingizwe Jean Marie Vianney na Nsaguye Jean
Bosco, nk’uko byasobanuwe haruguru mu gika cya 32 n’icya 33 cy’uru rubanza, bagaragaje ko
bahawe amakuru n’abaturage ko Manirafasha Gilbert acuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko
bw’urumogi, babarangira n’aho bamusanga iwabo wa Amani Christian, koko bajyayo
barahamufatira n’ubwo yabanje kubacika ariko baza kumufata barahamusubiza banamufatana
ibiyobyobyabwenge, bityo ubu buhamya bwabo bukaba bufite ishingiro.
[36] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ariko ntaho rwahera rwemeza ko udupfunyika 35
tw’urumogi n’agapfunyika kamwe ka mugo byasanzwe inyuma y’inzu y’iwabo wa Amani
Christian ari ibya Manirafasha Gilbert kuko abatangabuhamya basobanuwe mu gika kibanziriza
iki ari n’abo bagiye kumufata nk’aba polisi bashinzwe kurwanya ibiyobyabwenge, bagaragaje ko
basanze udupfunyika 6 tw’urumogi mu gikapu cya Manirafasha Gilbert cyarimo imyenda ye
4 Reba inyandiko mvugo y’ibyabonywe (p.v de constat) ndetse n’iyifatira.
5 Reba inyandiko mvugo y’ibazwa ryabo batangabuhamya mu Bugenzacyaha, yo ku wa
28/03/2020. 6 Reba ibika bya 16-17 by’urubanza no RPA 01859/2021/HC/KIG, rwaciwe n’Urukiko
Rukuru, ku wa 30/10/2024.

n’irangamuntu, akemera ko ari twe, bikaba bihuye n’ibyasobanuwe mu nyandiko mvugo
y’ibyabonywe(p.v de constat)6.
[37] Rusanga kandi abo batangabuhamya banagaragaje ko Manirafasha Gilbert yahakanye ko
ibyo biyobyabwenge ari ibye (udupfunyika 35 tw’urumogi n’agapfunyika 1 ka mugo),
agasobanura ko ari ibya Amani Christian wabacitse, bityo kuba ibyo biyobyabwenge (udupfunyika
35 tw’urumogi n’agapfunyika 1 ka mugo), byasanzwe iwabo wa Amani Christian, bikaba
bitarafatanwe Manirafasha Gilbert, bishidikanywaho mu kwemeza ko ari ibya Manirafasha
Gilbert.
[38] Rurasanga rero, kuba Manirafasha Gilbert yemera ko yafatanwe udupfunyika 6
tw’urumogi, bikanagaragazwa n’inyandiko mvugo y’ifatira yashyizeho umukono,
bigashimangirwa n’imvugo z’abatangabuhamya bagaragajwe mu gika cya 32 n’icya 33 cy’uru
rubanza, bamushinja gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi bakurikije amakuru
bahawe n’abaturage ko acuruza urumogi n’aho bamusanga, bigahura n’inyandiko mvugo
y’ibyabonywe (p.v de constat) yasobanuwe mu gika cya 36 cy’uru rubanza, ibyo, birahagije
nk’ibimenyetso byashingirwaho ahamwa n’icyaha aregwa cyo gufatanwa no gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, hakurikijwe umurongo watanzwe mu rubanza
RPAA 00408/2020/CA wagarutsweho mu gika cya 29 cy’uru rubanza, aho kuba kurufatanwa no
kurunywa nk’uko abiburanisha.
[39] N’aho ku bijyanye n’imiburanire ya Manirafasha Gilbert n’umwunganira, ko nta
bimenyetso bidashidikanywaho byashingiweho bimuhamya gucuruza urumogi, ko
ibiyobyabwenge yafatanwe (udupfunyika 6) ari bicye bikaba atari ibyo gucuruza ko ari ibyo
kwinywera, bashingiye ku murongo watanzwe mu rubanza RPAA 00082/2022/CA; Urukiko
rurasanga nta shingiro bifite, kuko n’ubwo ibiyobyabwenge yafatanwe ari bicye, bishyigikiwe
n’ibindi bimenyetso byasobanuwe mu gika kibanziriza iki, bituma ahamwa n’icyaha cyo
gufatanwa no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge aho kuba kubifatanwa no kubinywa nk’uko bashaka
kubyumvikanisha.
[40] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga kandi imiburanire ya Manirafasha Gilbert
n’umwunganira, ko ucuruza urumogi ari Amani Christian wabihaniwe, ko abatangabuhamya
bamushinja ari aba polisi bagiye kumufata kandi amakuru bahawe n’abaturage batabagaragaza
ndetse no kugaragaza ko amakuru babahaye ari ukuri, nta shingiro bifite kuko n’ubwo Amani
Christian yaba yarahaniwe gucuruza urumogi bitamukuraho icyaha yahaniwe hashingiwe ku
bimenyetso byasobanuwe mu gika cya 38 cy’uru rubanza.
[41] Byongeye kandi n’ubwo abatangabuhamya bashinja Manirafasha Gilbert gucuruza
urumogi ari aba polisi, ntaho Itegeko7 ribabuza gutanga ubuhamya, ahubwo urwego rubifitiye
6 Reba inyandiko mvugo y’ibyabonywe (p.v de constat) yo ku wa 21/03/2020.
7 Reba ingingo ya 53 y’Itegeko N° 062/2024 ryo ku wa 20/06/2024 rigenga ibimenyetso, yahinduye
ingingo ya 65 y’Itegeko N° 15/2004 ryo ku wa 12/06/2004 ryerekeye ibimenyetso mu manza n’itangwa
ryabyo, aho ivuga ko: “Urwego rufite ububasha rusuzuma ukwemerwa cyangwa ukutemerwa n’agaciro
by’ikimenyetso gishingiye ku buhamya. Ntirwita ku mubare w’abatangabuhamya, ahubwo rwita cyane
ku bumenyi bw’ibyabaye no ku budakemwa bw’ubuhamya batanga”.

ububasha harimo n’Urukiko rusuzuma mu bushishozi bwarwo agaciro gakwiye guhabwa
ikimenyetso gishingiye ku buhamya, bityo imyiregurire ya Manirafasha Gilbert n’umwunganira
ku buhamya bwatanzwe na Nasingizwe Jean Marie Vianney na Nsaguye Jean Bosco, nta shingiro
bifite.
[42] Hakurikijwe ibikorwa bigize icyaha Manirafasha Gilbert yarezwe ndetse n’ibimenyetso
byasobanuwe mu gika cya 38 cy’uru rubanza hamwe n’umurongo wafashwe mu rubanza
rwagaragajwe mu gika cya 29 cy’uru rubanza; Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ibyo bikorwa
bihuye n’icyaha cyo gufatanwa no gucuruza ibiyobyawenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi
yahamijwe n’Inkiko zibanza aho kuba icyaha cyo kubifatanwa no kubinywa nk’uko Manirafasha
Gilbert n’umwunganizi we bavuga, bityo ubujurire bwe kuri iyi ngingo bukaba nta shingiro
bufite.
b. Kumenya niba Manirafasha Gilbert akwiriye kugabanyirizwa ibihano
[43] Manirafasha Gilbert n’umwunganira, basaba ko yahanirwa gufatanwa no kunywa
ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, akagabanyirizwa ibihano kugeza ku gifungo
cy’umwaka umwe bashingiye ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha z’uko icyaha cyo gufatanwa no
kunywa urumogi acyemera ku buryo budashidikanywaho, kuba yarafatanwe udupfunyika ducye
tw’ibiyobyabwenge, akaba ari ubwa mbere akurikiranwe mu butabera ku buryo buzwi, icyaha
yakoze kikaba nta ngaruka cyateje muri sosiyete, akaba yari asanzwe yitwara neza mbere y’uko
akora icyo cyaha, akaba akomeje kwicuza no kugisabira imbabazi.
[44] Ubushinjacyaha busaba ko hagumaho imikirize y’urubanza Manirafasha Gilbert yajuririye
kuko hari ibimenyetso bimuhamya gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge kandi ko atari ubwa mbere yahaniwe
ibiyobyabwenge.
UKO URUKIKO RUBIBONA
Impaka kuri iyi ngingo, zishingiye kukumenya niba Manirafasha Gilbert akwiriye
kugabanyirizwa igihano kuri uru rwego, kuburyo yahanishwa igifungo kiri munsi y’imyaka
cumi n’irindwi (17) n’ihazabu ya miliyoni eshanu(5.000.000Frw) yahanishijwe n’Urukiko
Rukuru, kubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha yagaragaje.
[45] Ku birebana no kugabanya igihano mu gihe hari impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, ingingo ya 2
y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 rihindura Itegeko N° 68/2018 ryo ku wa 30/08/2018
riteganya ibyaha n’ibihano muri rusange, iteganya ko: “Iyo umucamanza yemeje impamvu
nyoroshyacyaha, ashobora kugabanya igihano ku buryo bukurikira: …; (a) igifungo cya burundu
gishobora kugabanywa ariko ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, … (d) igihano
cy’ihazabu gishobora kugabanywa kugeza kuri kimwe cya kane cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito
giteganyirijwe icyaha cyakozwe.”
[46] Nk’uko bigaragara, mu gika cya 238 cy’urubanza rujuririrwa, Urukiko Rukuru, rushingiye
kukuba Manirafasha Gilbert ari ubwa mbere aguye mu cyaha ku buryo buzwi no kuba yarafatiwe
8 Reba urubanza no RPA 01859/2021/HC/KIG, rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa 30/10/2024.

mu cyuho urumogi yazanye gucuruza rutari rwagera kubarunywa, rwaramugabanyirije igihano,
rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’irindwi (17) n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda
miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw) aho kuba igifungo cy’imyaka makumyabiri n’itanu (25)
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga miliyoni makumyabiri (20.000.000Frw) yahanishijwe n’Urukiko
Rwisumbuye.
[47] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, rurasanga icyaha Manirafasha Gilbert akwiriwe guhanirwa ari icyo
gufatanwa no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi nk’uko byagaragajwe
haruguru mu gika cya 42 cy’uru rubanza aho kuba icyaha cyo gufatanwa no kunywa
ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi nk’uko Manirafasha Gilbert n’umwunganira
babisabye.
[48] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire, rurasanga, n’ubwo Urukiko Rukuru rwagabanyirije Manirafasha
Gilbert ibihano, rumuhanisha igifungo cy’imyaka 17 rushingiye ku mpamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze,
ntacyari kurubuza kubimugabanyiriza kugeza kugifungo cy’imyaka 15 nk’uko rwabikoze
rumugabanyiriza ihazabu kugeza kuri 5.000.000Frw rushingiye ku ngingo ya 2 agace ka (a) n’aka
(d), y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo ku wa 04/12/2023 ryagarutsweho mu gika cya 45 cy’uru rubanza,
aho iyo ngingo agace ka (a) igaragaza ko “igifungo cya burundu gishobora kugabanywa ariko
ntikijye munsi y’igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 15, … agace ka (d) igihano cy’ihazabu gishobora
kugabanywa kugeza kuri kimwe cya kane cy’igihano cy’ihazabu gito giteganyirijwe icyaha
cyakozwe.
[49] Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rushingiye ku ngingo ya 2 agace ka (a) y’Itegeko N° 059/2023 ryo
ku wa 04/12/2023 ryagarutsweho mu gika cya 45 cy’uru rubanza, no kuba Manirafasha Gilbert
afite impamvu nyoroshyacyaha, n’ubwo impamvu ze z’ubujurire zidafite ishingiro, akwiriye
kugabanyirizwa igihano yahanishijwe n’urukiko Rukuru.
[50] Rurasanga kandi hari imanza zaciwe muri uru Rukiko ku bantu bakoze ibyaha bijya gusa
n’icyo Manirafasha Gilbert yahamijwe, harimo urubanza RPAA 00282/2024/CA, rwaciwe ku wa
14/02/2025, haburana Ubushinjacyaha na Hirwa Délice, aho Hirwa Délice yafatanwe udupfunyika
10 tw’urumogi, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rumugabanyiriza igihano cy’igifungo cy’imyaka 16
n’ihazabu ya 5.250.000 Frw yahanishijwe n’Urukiko rubanza ku cyaha cyo gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi, ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka 15 n’ihazabu ya
5.000.000Frw kuko yafatanwe ingano nto y’urumogi.
[51] Rurasanga mu rwego rwo gutanga ubutabera busa ku bibazo bisa, Manirafasha Gilbert
nawe akwiriye kugabanyirizwa ibihano kuko yafatiwe mu cyuho, afatanwa ingano nto y’urumogi
(Udupfunyika 6) atari yarukwirakwiza, akaba ahanishijwe igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15)
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000Frw).
[52] Hashingiwe kubimaze kuvugwa byose, Urukiko rw’Ubujurire rurasanga ibyasabwe na
Manirafasha Gilbert n’umwunganira, ko yagabanyirizwa igihano ku cyaha cyo gufatanwa no
kunywa ibiyobyabwenge kubera impamvu nyoroshyacyaha ze ndetse bashingiye no kurubanza RP
00680/2021/TGI/NYGE rwahanishije Gatera Olivier igifungo cy’umwaka umwe, bityo nawe
agahanishwa igifungo cy’umwaka umwe, nta shingiro bifite, kuko icyaha yahamijwe ari icyo
gufatanwa no gucuruza ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi kandi ibihano bijyanye nicyo
cyaha bitandukanye n’ibihano bijyanye n’icyaha basabye guhanirwa.

III. ICYEMEZO CY’URUKIKO
[53] Rwemeje ko ubujurire bwatanzwe na Manirafasha Gilbert nta shingiro bufite;
[54] Rwemeje ko urubanza RPA 01859/2021/HC/KIG, rwaciwe n’Urukiko Rukuru, ku wa
30/10/2024, ruhindutse ku bijyanye n’igifungo Manirafasha Gilbert yahanishijwe;
[55] Rwemeje ko Manirafasha Gilbert ahamwe n’icyaha cyo gufatanwa no gucuruza
ibiyobyabwenge byo mu bwoko bw’urumogi;
[56] Rutegetse ko Manirafasha Gilbert ahanishwa igifungo cy’imyaka cumi n’itanu (15)
n’ihazabu y’amafaranga y’u Rwanda miliyoni eshanu (5.000.000 Frw).
